data.BULLET_3: A graph of agents, one user
data.BULLET_5: Nobody can draw the flow from memory

data.HEADLINE: Cut these first
data.BULLET_1: Replace agent loops with one prompt
data.BULLET_2: Swap the vector DB for grep
data.BULLET_3: Drop the router until you have 2 paths
data.BULLET_4: Kill every retry that isn't network
data.BULLET_5: Delete the eval harness you never run

data.STAT_LABEL: of the code I delete on day 1

data.HEADLINE: You know it's fixed when
data.BULLET_1: One diagram fits on one page
data.BULLET_2: One LLM call per user action
data.BULLET_3: You can debug it without a trace tool
data.BULLET_4: New hires ship a change in a week
data.BULLET_5: The on-call doc is 5 lines, not 50

data.CTA_SUBTEXT: I'll tell you what to cut first
